targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (src) src AS bssid, fields->>'ssid' AS ssid, channel, rssi_dbm AS rssi, fields->>'encryption' AS encryption, MIN(ts) AS first_seen, MAX(ts) AS last_seen, COUNT(*) AS beacon_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'beacon' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src, fields->>'ssid', channel, rssi_dbm, fields->>'encryption' ORDER BY src, last_seen DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(fields->>'bssid', dst) AS ap, COUNT(DISTINCT src) AS client_count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'data' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY COALESCE(fields->>'bssid', dst) ORDER BY client_count DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT time_bucket('30 seconds', ts) AS time, src AS metric, AVG(rssi_dbm) AS value FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND rssi_dbm IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT fields->>'frame_type' AS frame_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY fields->>'frame_type' ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT ts AS time, src AS bssid, dst AS client, (fields->>'reason')::text AS reason, (fields->>'count')::text AS frame_count, fields->>'direction' AS direction FROM headers WHERE protocol = 'wifi' AND fields->>'frame_type' = 'deauth' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 100;
